name: excali
description: Open .excalidraw files from the terminal in the real Excalidraw, with autosave. One dependency-free Bun script.

scripts.compile: bun build --compile excali.ts --outfile ~/.bun/bin/excali && mkdir -p $(brew --prefix)/share/man/man1 && cp man/excali.1 $(brew --prefix)/share/man/man1/
